acceptance_criteria.description: TypeScript compiles with no errors including the test file
All Ring 0 impl validator unit tests pass
Graph utility unit tests pass (cycle detection, adjacency list construction)
Test coverage includes positive and negative cases for all 18 Ring 0 rules and graph utilities
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify that impl-validator.test.ts contains at least one positive (passing) and one negative (failing) test case for each of the 18 R0-I rules (R0-I40 through R0-I51, R0-I60 through R0-I67). Verify it includes tests for graph utilities: buildAdjacencyList with empty/non-empty graphs, detectCycles with acyclic graphs, simple cycles, and transitive cycles. Verify fixtures include a valid impl doc (JSON+Markdown) and invalid samples covering each rule violation. Verdict: PASS if all rules and graph utilities have positive+negative coverage with appropriate fixtures; FAIL if any rule lacks test coverage.

acceptance_criteria.description: Test fixtures are synthetic and self-contained, not depending on external files
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify that all test fixtures in tests/fixtures/impl-docs/ and inline test data in the test file are synthetic (fabricated for testing), self-contained (no references to real project files that must exist), and clearly named to indicate their purpose (e.g., valid-impl.json, invalid-impl-samples.ts with descriptive exports). Verdict: PASS if all fixtures are synthetic and self-contained; FAIL if any depend on real project state.

acceptance_criteria.description: Full test suite runs without errors
